title: HOW
WE WORK.
hero.intro: No endless discovery phases. No let's explore. We move.

cta.title: READY WHEN IT NEEDS TO SHIP.

cards.title: YOU BRING THE PROBLEM
cards.description: What needs to work? Where does it break? What outcome actually matters?

cards.title: WE FIGURE OUT WHAT'S REAL
cards.description: What can actually be built. What the constraints are. What the honest timeline looks like.

cards.title: WE BUILD
cards.description: Fast. Not perfect. Something you can touch and test.

cards.title: WE LAUNCH
cards.description: It goes live. You start seeing results. We iterate from there.

sections.title: NO THEATER
sections.body: No long discovery engagements. No vague transformation decks. We build.
